description: Creates a 3D right angle marker (90 degree square corner indicator)
utility: Show a right angle indicator in 3D space between two rays from a vertex

arguments.name: vertex_x
arguments.description: X coordinate of the angle vertex

arguments.name: vertex_y
arguments.description: Y coordinate of the angle vertex

arguments.name: vertex_z
arguments.description: Z coordinate of the angle vertex

arguments.name: point1_x
arguments.description: X coordinate of the first ray endpoint

arguments.name: point1_y
arguments.description: Y coordinate of the first ray endpoint

arguments.name: point1_z
arguments.description: Z coordinate of the first ray endpoint

arguments.name: point2_x
arguments.description: X coordinate of the second ray endpoint

arguments.name: point2_y
arguments.description: Y coordinate of the second ray endpoint

arguments.name: point2_z
arguments.description: Z coordinate of the second ray endpoint

alternates.syntax: rightangle3d(graph, vertex_x, vertex_y, vertex_z, point1_x, point1_y, point1_z, point2_x, point2_y, point2_z, size)
alternates.description: Specify a custom size for the right angle indicator
Create right angle between two vector3d expressions
Create right angle between two line3d expressions

examples.scenario: right angle at origin between x and y axes
